fact: NEVER commit a hardcoded SECRET_KEY — always load from os.environ.get('SECRET_KEY', fallback)
ALWAYS call db.refresh(obj) after db.commit() before accessing ORM attributes on the committed object
ALWAYS add allow_credentials=True to CORSMiddleware when the frontend sends Authorization headers
NEVER use payload['sub'] on a decoded JWT — use payload.get('sub') to avoid unhandled KeyError 500
ALWAYS wrap frontend async API calls in try/catch and show a user-visible error message on failure
NEVER use window.location.href for in-app navigation — use React Router navigate()
SQLite FK enforcement requires PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON set via SQLAlchemy event listener on every connection
Password fields in Pydantic schemas must enforce minimum 8 characters via field_validator
All GitHub issues must have implementation comments before being closed
Task tracking uses GitHub Project #1 (KasirajanA/i2i-anticlock-metaswarm) — do NOT use built-in TaskCreate/TaskUpdate
